name: Evidence Quality
description: Substrate-density evaluator. Computes structured evidence-quality assessments for entities, persons, topics, exchange-windows, and speakers. Used as a refuse-and-log gate before any LLM synthesis (contemplation, reconstruction, standing/crystallization metabolism). Closes the density axis of epistemic discipline; complements the trust-circle plugin's provenance axis.

thresholds.description: Override sane defaults for refuse/low/medium/high cutoffs.

noiseBlacklist.description: Entity canonical_names that should never seed contemplation, regardless of mention_count. Hand-curated list of known extraction artifacts.
